basic_info.title: Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots
basic_info.review: A visually stunning and emotionally resonant conclusion to the Solid Snake saga, praised for its technical achievements and narrative depth.

alternative_names: メタルギア・ソリッド4・ガンズ・オブ・ザ・パトリオット

similar_games.title: Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain

play_today.details: The definitive original version with Trophy support and all DLC content. Despite running at variable frame rates (15-60fps depending on scene), this remains the most complete experience with online multiplayer intact. The Legacy Collection includes additional VR missions and digital graphic novels.

recommended_patches.name: Trophy Patch
recommended_patches.description: Enables PlayStation 3 trophy support for the original disc version

recommended_patches.name: Online Multiplayer Server (Community)
recommended_patches.description: Community-run servers for online multiplayer modes after official server shutdown

play_today.details: PS3 emulation via RPCS3 can achieve 4K resolution and 60fps with modern hardware. Requires canary patches for stability. Digital Foundry analysis confirms this provides the best visual experience available, surpassing all official versions.

recommended_patches.name: RPCS3 Canary Patches
recommended_patches.description: Essential patches for game stability and crash prevention - required for smooth gameplay from start to finish

recommended_patches.name: Lossless Scaling Mod
recommended_patches.description: Upscales resolution and improves frame pacing for smoother gameplay on PC hardware

optimal_settings: Resolution Scale: 4x (1440p) or higher for 4K output
Frame Rate Limit: Off or 60fps cap
Enable Canary Patches via Patch Manager
Use 6+ core CPU for optimal performance
Resolution Scale: Native PS3 resolution (720p) or higher

play_today.platform: PlayStation 5 / Xbox Series X/S (Master Collection Vol. 2)
play_today.details: Announced for August 27, 2026 release. Digital Foundry confirms this will finally deliver the promised 60fps target that was never achieved on PS3. Some cutscenes may remain at 30fps. This represents the first official modern port of MGS4.

recommended_patches.name: Master Collection Vol. 2 Update
recommended_patches.description: Official remaster delivering native 60fps gameplay and modernized graphics

play_today.details: Part of Master Collection Vol. 2 release. Digital Foundry notes this is a challenging port given the hardware limitations compared to PS3, but will provide accessible play for new audiences.

recommended_patches.name: Master Collection Vol. 2 Update
recommended_patches.description: Official remaster with optimized performance for Switch hardware

play_today.details: The 2011 HD Collection version lacks MGS4 content. Only available through the Legacy Collection which includes Trophy Edition.

The European release of the original game. Contains the full English localization and all story content. While the hardware limitations of the PS3 result in lower resolution and frame rates compared to modern standards, it remains the most authentic way to experience the game's original pacing and atmosphere.

recommended_patches.name: MGS4 60FPS Unlock Patch
recommended_patches.description: Specific to the PlayStation 3 version, this patch modifies the game's vblank frequency to unlock the framerate from 30 to 60 FPS, significantly reducing input lag and smoothing gameplay when played via RPCS3 emulation.

recommended_patches.name: MGS4 Internal Resolution Force Patch
recommended_patches.description: A PlayStation 3 specific modification that forces the game to render at higher internal resolutions (up to 4K) when emulated, bypassing the native 720p hardware limitations for sharper visuals.

recommended_patches.name: Canary Patch (MGS4 Compatibility)
recommended_patches.description: A critical compatibility patch for the PlayStation 3 version required to run Metal Gear Solid 4 on modern RPCS3 builds, fixing crash issues and enabling stable gameplay.

optimal_settings: Enable Vulkan API for best performance on modern GPUs
Set Resolution Scale to 2x or 3x for 4K output
Enable 'Force Internal Resolution' to 1920x1080 or higher
Set GPU Accuracy to 'High' to prevent graphical glitches
Enable Vulkan API for optimal Linux driver support
Set Resolution Scale to 2x for 4K output
Set GPU Accuracy to 'High' for stability

description.synopsis: Set in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by war, an aging Solid Snake is forced out of retirement for one final mission. Tasked with assassinating Liquid Ocelot, who has taken control of the Patriots' AI system, Snake must confront his past and the genetic legacy of the Patriots. As he battles through a crumbling world, Snake discovers the true nature of the Patriots' control over global conflict and faces his own mortality.
key_features: Fox Engine graphics rendering with dynamic lighting and high-resolution textures
Tactical Espionage Action (TEA) gameplay with stealth and combat integration
Dynamic difficulty adjustment based on player performance
Cross-platform online multiplayer modes (Metal Gear Online 2)
CQC (Close Quarters Combat) system with context-sensitive takedowns
Real-time aging of the protagonist Solid Snake
Extensive customization of weapons and gadgets via the Codec
Cinematic cutscenes with motion capture technology
Integration of previous Metal Gear Solid characters and storylines
legacy_and_impact: Metal Gear Solid 4 is widely regarded as a technical marvel that pushed the PlayStation 3 to its limits, setting a new standard for cinematic storytelling in video games. It successfully concluded the long-running Solid Snake narrative, providing closure to decades of plot threads while introducing the Fox Engine, which would define Konami's future development.
